values.content:
You are an inside sales rep at Pemo, a B2B fintech serving SMEs in MENA (UAE, Saudi Arabia, Egypt).

This is the FIRST email in a warm-lead nurture sequence (Day 0). The lead expressed interest but did not request an urgent demo — they're exploring.

Tone: warm, helpful, NOT pushy. Position Pemo as a useful resource, not a hard sell.

Country-specific value props (use ONE that fits their country):
- UAE: real-time spend visibility for fast-scaling SMEs; multi-currency cards; eliminate shared-card chaos
- Saudi Arabia: ZATCA-ready VAT export; Arabic-first UI; instant SAR settlement via neoleap (Alrajhi)
- Egypt: cost optimization under EGP volatility; multi-bank consolidation; simplified expense reporting
- Other / fallback: real-time spend visibility; AI-powered receipt automation; team spending controls

Email rules:
- 5-7 sentences MAX
- Reference at least one specific detail from their profile or message
- Soft CTA: "happy to chat when useful" — NOT "book a demo now"
- Mention you'll share more useful info in coming days
- Sign off with the rep's name

Output: JSON {subject, body}. No markdown, no preamble, no code fences.
If language is "ar", write the entire email in Arabic. Otherwise English. Never mix.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ (() => { const l = $('Parse Day 0').item.json; return JSON.stringify({ properties: { hs_timestamp: $now.toMillis(), hs_email_direction: "EMAIL", hs_email_status: "SENT", hs_email_subject: l._outreach.subject, hs_email_text: l._outreach.body, hs_email_headers: JSON.stringify({ from: { email: l._assignment.rep_email, firstName: l._assignment.rep_name }, to: [{ email: l.email, firstName: l.contact_name }] }) }, associations: [ { to: { id: l._hubspot.contact_id }, types: [{ associationCategory: "HUBSPOT_DEFINED", associationTypeId: 198 }] } ] }); })() }}

values.content:
You are an inside sales rep at Pemo (B2B fintech, MENA SMEs).

This is the SECOND email in a warm-lead sequence (Day 3 — three days after the first soft outreach). The lead hasn't replied yet but didn't unsubscribe either.

Tone: helpful, share value, NO hard sell. Reference industry-specific use case.

Country-specific value props (use ONE):
- UAE: real-time spend visibility, multi-currency cards, eliminate shared-card chaos
- Saudi Arabia: ZATCA-ready VAT, Arabic-first UI, neoleap (Alrajhi) instant SAR settlement
- Egypt: cost optimization under EGP volatility, multi-bank consolidation
- Other: real-time spend visibility, AI receipt automation, team controls

Email rules:
- 5-7 sentences MAX
- Reference an industry-specific use case (their industry from profile)
- Soft CTA: offer a 15-min discovery call OR send a one-pager
- Acknowledge timing: "I sent a quick intro a few days back"
- Sign off with the rep's name

Output: JSON {subject, body}. No markdown, no preamble.
If language is "ar", entire email in Arabic. Otherwise English. No mixing.

=Lead profile:
- Company: {{ $('Sequence Config').item.json.company_name }} ({{ $('Sequence Config').item.json.country }}, {{ $('Sequence Config').item.json.industry }}, ~{{ $('Sequence Config').item.json.company_size }} employees)
- Contact: {{ $('Sequence Config').item.json.contact_name }} ({{ $('Sequence Config').item.json.email }})
- Tech stack: {{ ($('Sequence Config').item.json.tech_stack || []).join(', ') }}
- Inbound message: "{{ $('Sequence Config').item.json.raw_message }}"
- Language: {{ $('Sequence Config').item.json.language }}
- Rep: {{ $('Sequence Config').item.json._assignment.rep_name }} ({{ $('Sequence Config').item.json._assignment.rep_email }})

Generate the Day 3 follow-up email now. Output JSON only.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ (() => { const l = $('Parse Day 3').item.json; return JSON.stringify({ properties: { hs_timestamp: $now.toMillis(), hs_email_direction: 'EMAIL', hs_email_status: 'SENT', hs_email_subject: l._outreach.subject, hs_email_text: l._outreach.body, hs_email_headers: JSON.stringify({ from: { email: l._assignment.rep_email, firstName: l._assignment.rep_name }, to: [{ email: l.email, firstName: l.contact_name }] }) }, associations: [ { to: { id: l._hubspot.contact_id }, types: [{ associationCategory: 'HUBSPOT_DEFINED', associationTypeId: 198 }] } ] }); })() }}

values.content:
You are an inside sales rep at Pemo (B2B fintech, MENA SMEs).

This is the FINAL email (Day 7) in a warm-lead nurture sequence. The lead hasn't responded to two prior emails.

Tone: respectful, gentle, give them an easy out. NOT desperate, NOT pushy.

Email rules:
- 4-6 sentences MAX
- Acknowledge silence: "I'll stop reaching out after this"
- Offer simple ways to stay in touch (newsletter, content) IF they want
- One last short value-prop reminder (country-relevant)
- Wish them well, sign off with the rep's name

Output: JSON {subject, body}. No markdown, no preamble.
If language is "ar", entire email in Arabic. Otherwise English. No mixing.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ (() => { const l = $('Parse Day 7').item.json; return JSON.stringify({ properties: { hs_timestamp: $now.toMillis(), hs_email_direction: 'EMAIL', hs_email_status: 'SENT', hs_email_subject: l._outreach.subject, hs_email_text: l._outreach.body, hs_email_headers: JSON.stringify({ from: { email: l._assignment.rep_email, firstName: l._assignment.rep_name }, to: [{ email: l.email, firstName: l.contact_name }] }) }, associations: [ { to: { id: l._hubspot.contact_id }, types: [{ associationCategory: 'HUBSPOT_DEFINED', associationTypeId: 198 }] } ] }); })() }}

parameters.content:
## ☀️ Warm Sequence (Day 0 / 3 / 7)

Sub-workflow triggered by **MAIN** when a lead scores 50–79.

**Pattern**: send → wait → reply check → branch.

**Reply check** queries HubSpot for `pemo_replied`. If true at any
checkpoint, the sequence stops and Slack alerts the rep — no more
emails sent.

**Wait durations** are externalized in `Sequence Config` (top of
workflow). Demo runs at 60s. Production: flip to 259200 (3d) and
345600 (4d) - single-line config change, no logic refactor.

**LLM prompts differ per step**: Day 0 = warm intro, Day 3 = value
follow-up with industry use case, Day 7 = gentle final-touch with
easy out. Country-specific value props baked into each system prompt.

Every sent email lands in the HubSpot timeline as an Email
engagement, and `pemo_sequence_step` tracks the last step sent -
used by WF-MONITORING to spot stuck sequences.

## Day 0 (Initial Soft Touch)

First email after lead lands in warm tier. Tone is helpful, not salesy.
They're exploring, not buying.

LLM personalizes around country-specific value props (UAE / KSA / EGY)
and references a concrete detail from the inbound message. Soft CTA:
"happy to chat when useful". No demo pressure.

Logged as Email engagement in HubSpot, sequence step set to
`warm_day_0_sent`. Then we wait.

## Day 3 (Value Follow-Up)

After 3 days of silence we check HubSpot for `pemo_replied`. If true,
Slack alerts the rep and the sequence halts. If false, second email
goes out.

This one is more substantive: industry-specific use case from the
lead's profile, and a clearer CTA (15-min discovery call or a
one-pager). Acknowledges the timing ("I sent a quick intro a few days
back") so it doesn't read as a fresh cold email.

## Day 7 (Gentle Close-Loop)

Last reply check. If still silent, one final email with an easy out:
"I'll stop reaching out, but here's how to stay in touch if useful".
Respectful exit, not a desperate last shot.

Sequence step is set to `warm_completed_no_reply` and a digest note is
posted to #leads-digest so the rep knows the lead exited the sequence
cleanly. WF-MONITORING uses this state to surface stale leads later.

_trello_payload.name: [63.5] Al-Najm Trading Co — Khalid Al-Otaibi
_trello_payload.desc:
**Tier:** WARM — 63.5/100  |  Confidence: 1

**Qualification Summary**
Al-Najm Trading Co is a warm lead from Saudi Arabia in the retail sector, seeking an expense management solution for their small team of 15. The lead comes from a trusted partner source, but lacks strong intent keywords. Recommend nurturing this lead with tailored information before pursuing a demo call.

**Lead Profile**
- Country: SA  |  Industry: retail  |  Size: 15
- Source: partner (raw: partner)
- Language: ar
- Tech stack: excel

**Score Breakdown**
- **Firmographic** 31.85/35
  - country: tier-1 market (SA) (1)
  - size: 15 employees → acceptable lower (0.7)
  - industry: high-fit industry (retail) (1)
- **Intent** 4.8/30
  - no intent keywords detected
  - general inquiry form intent: "info" (+0.16)
- **Source Quality** 19/20
  - source "partner" weighted at 0.95
- **Engagement** 7.8/15
  - submitted 2d ago → this_week
  - first visit

**Inbound Message**
> تم تحويلي إليكم من شريككم. نبحث عن حل لإدارة المصاريف لفريقنا الصغير.

---
🔗 [HubSpot Contact](https://app-eu1.hubspot.com/contacts/148389230/record/0-1/770832159940)  |  📧 khalid@alnajm-trading.sa  |  ☎️ +966501234567
